name: Will I get fired for filing workers comp in Bountiful?

mainEntity.name: Will I get fired for filing workers comp in Bountiful?

acceptedAnswer.description: Utah prohibits retaliation; it's illegal to fire for valid claims.[2] But prove retaliation if occurs.[1] Key factors: document interactions; light duty refusal risks benefits not job. Report to Labor Commission.[2] Attorney protects rights.
